query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trial_feature_exploration (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  trialUserId INT NOT NULL,
  featureCategory VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  featureName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  firstExploredAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  lastExploredAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  explorationCount INT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  totalTimeSeconds INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  completedAction BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  INDEX idx_feature_user (trialUserId),
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user_feature (trialUserId, featureCategory, featureName),
  FOREIGN KEY (trialUserId) REFERENCES trial_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trial_feature_exploration (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  trialUserId INT NOT NULL,
  featureCategory VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  featureName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  firstExploredAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  lastExploredAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  explorationCount INT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  totalTimeSeconds INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  completedAction BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  INDEX idx_feature_user (trialUserId),
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user_feature (trialUserId, featureCategory, featureName),
  FOREIGN KEY (trialUserId) REFERENCES trial_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
